onset.Description: Onset of the first frame of visual flicker presented on the screen.

duration.Description: Duration of visual flicker presented on the screen.

trial.Description: The current trial index in a block.

value.Description: The code (EEG Marker or Trigger value) associated with an event. The values 31-45, 91-105, 151-165, 211-225 respectively correspond to the Low-Depth stimulus paradigm in four sessions., while the values 46-60, 106-120, 166-180, 226-240 correspond to the High-Depth stimulus paradigm in four sessions.

stim_frequency.Description: Stimulus frequency of the target of visual flicker attended by the participant.
